title: Public Bucket Exposure
description:
A production S3 bucket may have drifted into a public-read state.

Download the case pack and investigate multi-source cloud evidence (S3 server access logs, CloudTrail events, AWS Config evaluations, Security Hub findings, and policy snapshots).

Expect realistic noise and false positives. Identify the *primary* CIA pillar violated.

Flag Format
CTF{pillar}
